---
title: "Bernard John Seymour Coleridge"
---

## Bernard John Seymour Coleridge

**Dates:** (1851-1927)

### Description

2nd Lord Coleridge, cousin of CMY

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 17 th 1894
- Letter from Decr 1st [or 14?] [1883]
- Letter from July 3d [1876]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
